# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  - name: vnetName
    type: string
    defaultValue: 'myVNet'
  - name: storageAccountName
    type: string
    defaultValue: 'myStorageAccount'
  - name: sqlServerName
    type: string
    defaultValue: 'mySQLServer'

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: $(storageAccountName)
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    properties:
      kind: StorageV2
      location: 'eastus'
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      networkRuleSet:
        virtualNetworkRules:
          - subnet: /subscriptions/<subscription-id>/resourceGroups/<resource-group-name>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/<vnetName>/subnets/default

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: $(sqlServerName)
    apiVersion: 2023-02-01-preview
    properties:
      location: 'eastus'
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      virtualNetworkRules:
        - subnet: /subscriptions/<subscription-id>/resourceGroups/<resource-group-name>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/<vnetName>/subnets/default
